text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Best to Worst — as input n grows larger

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: O(1) Constant — always same steps, no matter how big n is

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: O(log n) Logarithmic — n doubles, only +1 step

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: O(n) Linear — steps grow exactly with input

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: O(n log n) Log-linear — best sorting algorithms live here

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: O(n2) Quadratic — nested loops, gets slow fast

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: O(n3) Cubic — triple nested loops, very slow

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: O(2^n) Exponential — each step doubles work. Avoid for n>25

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
